PETITIONER AMERICAN ARAB ANTI-DISCRIMINATION COMMITTEE-SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY'S PETITION TO SHOW CAUSE WHY RECORDS SHOULD NOT BE DISCLOSED -- 1) RE: OPERATIONS PLAN OF 4-9 & 5-7 RALLY - DENIED PURSUANT TO GOV. CODE 6254(F) 2) RE: COMPLAINT OF HATE CRIMES - IF RESPONDENT HAS REDACTED TO PROVIDE INFO RE: TIME, OCCURANCE & SUBSTANCE OF COMPLAINT E.G. HATE CATEGORY WITHOUT DISCLOSING INFO IDENTIFYING VICTIM OR WITNESSES OR WORK PRODUCT OF AN INVESTIGATIVE AGENCY, SUCH INFO SUFFICES TO COMPLY WITH INFORMATION ACT REQUEST. 3) RE: INVESTIGATIVE FILES OF STUDENT PROGRAM LEADERSHIP DEVELOPMENT -- NO FILES EXIST. 4) RE: DVD 5-7 RALLY - DENIED PURSUANT TO GOV. CODE 6254(F) AND 6255(A). 5) RE: VIDEOS OF THE 4-9 AND 5-7 RALLIES DENIED PURSUANT TO GOV. CODE 6254(F). (DAG/301/EH) REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, #4780

calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Why Records Should Not Be Disclosed
Off Calendar Mar-13-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Osha Newmann, Esq., 510/644-2429, for petitioner American Arab Anti-Discrimination Committee-San Francisco State University, moving to show cause why records should not be disclosed
Hiren Patel, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL 916/327-7870, for respondent and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as amended -- Petitioner American Arab Anti-Discrimination Committee-San Francisco State University's petition to show cause why records should not be disclosed -- 1) Re: operations plan of 4-9 & 5-7 rally - denied pursuant to Gov. Code 6254(f) 2) Re: complaint of hate crimes - if respondent has redacted to provide info re: time, occurance & substance of complaint e.g. hate category without disclosing info identifying victim or witnesses or work product of an investigative agency, such info suffices to comply with Information Act request. 3) Re: Investigative Files of Student Program Leadership Development -- No files exist. 4) Re: DVD 5-7 rally - denied pursuant to Gov. Code 6254(f) and 6255(a). 5) Re: videos of the 4-9 and 5-7 rallies denied pursuant to Gov. Code 6254(f). (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, #4780
